Available for rent: 3BR/2BA house at 1234 Oak Street, Austin TX 78704

$2,200/month, 12-month lease starting March 1st.

Property managed by Hill Country Property Management. Contact our office at (512) 555-0100 to schedule a showing.

Features:
- Updated kitchen with granite counters
- Hardwood floors throughout
- Fenced backyard
- 2-car garage
- Central A/C and heating
- Washer/dryer hookups

Pets allowed with deposit. Application required with credit check. First month + security deposit due at signing.

Open house this Saturday 10am-2pm. Come see it in person!
